item.description: Joshua Addison signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Student NWCD.

item.title: ❓💵Alex Hamasaki - American Heart Association
item.description: Alex Hamasaki signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent American Heart Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: Revenues up, budgets released, and House and Senate propose cuts to K12 education - WSPTA
item.description: News article "Revenues up, budgets released, and House and Senate propose cuts to K12 education - WSPTA" from Washington St Pta.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.
item.description: Minority; do not pass.
